label: Quick Access — fixed layout
items: The mobile Quick Access screen is now fixed to one viewport — all four shortcuts (Visual Lens, Today, Quick Capture, The Library) sit in a 2×2 grid with no scrolling.
Trimmed the hero so the tiles always have room, even on smaller phones.

label: The Library — better search
items: Search now waits for you — type your query and press the Search button (or Enter). No more auto-firing on every keystroke.
Results are grouped by source — AI suggestions first, then Perenual, then Verdantly — matching The Shed's plant search.
Each section has its own "Show more" button, capped at 10 results per page so the screen stays scannable.

label: The Shed — Perenual pagination
items: The Shed's Add Plant search now shows the first 10 Perenual results with a "Show more" button to load the next page, just like the AI and Verdantly sections already had.
